_comment: Provenance metadata for housing-needs-assessment.html widgets. Each entry describes a displayed output: its data source, vintage, transformation type, and direct verification URL.

widgets.label: Housing stock by structure type
widgets.notes: B25024 units-in-structure variable groups, aggregated by COHO.

widgets.label: Owner/renter shares
widgets.notes: B25003 tenure table, owner vs. renter share.

widgets.label: Affordability — income needed to afford typical home
widgets.notes: Simple mortgage model applied to ACS median home value. Gross rent limits from HUD FMR. Not a market appraisal.

widgets.label: Rent burden distribution (GRAPI)
widgets.notes: Gross Rent as a Percentage of Income (GRAPI) bins from ACS DP04.

widgets.label: Cost burden by AMI tier (HUD CHAS)
widgets.notes: Renter households by AMI tier and burden status. For place/CDP geographies, values are scaled from the containing county (proxy).

widgets.label: Commuting mode share
widgets.notes: Travel mode to work from ACS subject table S0801.

widgets.label: Commuting: inflow & outflow (LEHD LODES)
widgets.notes: Workplace-based OD flows from LODES8. County-level only; statewide inflow/outflow suppressed to avoid double-counting.

widgets.label: Age pyramid
widgets.notes: County-level single-year-of-age population. For municipalities/CDPs, uses containing county as context.

widgets.label: Senior growth pressure
widgets.notes: DOLA county forecasts for 55+ and 65+ age cohorts.

widgets.label: Population projection: DOLA forecast vs historic-trend sensitivity
widgets.notes: 20-year housing need projection using DOLA base population + transparent headship/vacancy formula.

widgets.label: Household income distribution
widgets.notes: Household income brackets from ACS DP03.

widgets.label: Age of housing stock
widgets.notes: Year structure built from ACS B25034.

widgets.label: Owner housing cost burden (SMOCAPI)
widgets.notes: Selected Monthly Owner Costs as a Percentage of Income (SMOCAPI) bins.

widgets.label: Top industries by employment
widgets.notes: Top NAICS 2-digit sectors by jobs count from LODES WAC.

widgets.label: Employment trend
widgets.notes: Local Area Unemployment Statistics employment-level trend.
